overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character with a large backpack traversing a rocky, alien mountain landscape at night. The character moves steadily toward massive floating rock formations under a starry sky, with atmospheric fog and a futuristic UI indicating approach to a location called 'Plate Gate 0-Old Terminal'.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky wasteland approach to floating formations

agents.ego_description: character with large backpack jogging steadily through rocky terrain toward distant floating rock formations

entered.detail: large dark rock formation on the left side of the path
scattered boulders and elevated ground on the right
massive floating rock formation hovering in the distance with smaller debris around it
dark night sky visible above with faint stars
rocky dirt trail winding through the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a barren rocky landscape at night, approaching massive floating rock formations in the distance. The terrain is flanked by rocky outcrops on both sides under a starry sky, with atmospheric haze obscuring the far horizon.

events.description: futuristic UI scan line appears at top of screen followed by location text 'Plate Gate 0-Old Terminal'

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the destination as the location is identified by on-screen display

entered.detail: dilapidated metal building or shelter becoming visible on the right horizon
low metal fencing or debris along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues running, a futuristic UI element identifies the area as 'Plate Gate 0-Old Terminal'. The floating rock formations draw closer while ruined structures and metal debris appear on the right side of the path. The left cliff face approaches nearer as the character advances through the misty terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a barren nocturnal wasteland that gradually reveals the ruins of a futuristic outpost. It begins with the character running through a rocky landscape under a starry sky, heading toward massive floating rock formations obscured by a distant atmospheric haze. As the character advances, a futuristic UI element identifies the location as Plate Gate 0-Old Terminal while the surrounding terrain tightens. The scene then shifts as the left cliff face draws nearer and the path opens up to reveal ruined structures and metal debris scattered along the right side. Finally, the camera closes the distance to the floating monoliths as the character pushes deeper into the misty environment.
